name: nftables router ingress repair
prompt: You are working in a benchmark fixture. Repair the nftables ruleset so the router keeps a default-drop posture, forwards LAN traffic correctly toward the WAN, and DNATs HTTP/HTTPS to the k3s ingress VIP. Keep nftables as the source of truth, make the smallest correct changes, and do not add unrelated files. Success means the verifier script passes.
